LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-13-2025 HEARING RE: CROSS DEFENDANT ON24, INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ON24'S DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 17200 IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AND ITS DEMURRER TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTIONS IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KEVIN NGAI, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas F. Nowland (tel: 949-221-0005) for Defendant Labroots, Inc.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: CROSS DEFENDANT ON24, INC.'s DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

On24's demurrer to the fifth cause of action for violation of Business and Professions Code 17200 in the cross-complaint is sustained without leave to amend and its demurrer to all other causes of actions in the cross-complaint is overruled. Labroots concedes that its 17200 claim is invalid. All other claims in the cross-complaint are adequately alleged.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK).

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT ON24, INC.'s DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Ordered off calendar for both parties' noncompliance with CRC 3.1113(f) and Labroots, Inc.'s noncompliance with CRC 3.1113(d). Upon full compliance, the demurrer may be re-set for a hearing date after December 24. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Jan-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: CROSS DEFENDANT ON24, INC. DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Kevin H. Ngai, Esq., of Law Offices of Thomas F. Nowland, (949) 221-0005, for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court reminds counsel of the untimely filing of his opposition to the subject motion and untimely notice of his opposition to the court's tentative ruling. Counsel reports re the court's query. Upon conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Law and Motion on Dec-11-2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302. Counsel is instructed to advise opposing counsel of the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Kevin H. Ngai, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS F. NOWLAND (949) 221-0005 Attorneys for Defendant LABROOTS, INC.
No other appearance

Not contested. Counsel for defendant seeks clarification of the Court's tentative ruling.

Court provides clarification and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT ON24, INC. DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT

Off calendar. The Crawford declaration fails to show parties met and conferred in person, by telephone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 430.41. Response now due by October 28, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
